note: Temporary architecture exceptions. Every entry must have an owner, a concrete reason, and an expiry date. Expired entries fail CI.

entries.reason: Backlog orchestration is still decomposing; this PR only hardens the queue boundary.
Catchup flow still lives in a legacy file while queue contracts are being tightened.
Autopilot worker is the primary decomposition hotspot; this PR only adds typed contract parsing at the boundary.
